title: Swarm Robotics: Coordinating Distributed Autonomous Agents
author: Echo Sullivan
Robotics Engineer
description: Program decentralized robot swarms—but coordination breaks down at scale
content:
Swarm robotics achieves complex tasks through simple local interactions between many robots.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Swarm Coordination Collapse (2042)](/docs/articles/swarm-collapse-2042)
